response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires deep Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise and Spring ecosystem experience, which are essentially absent from the resume. Java appears only as a listed skill and in passing mentions (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) without depth, and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or IDE/language tooling work. Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not align with the JVM tooling focus.
strengths: Extensive experience with complex systems and large-scale codebases
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some exposure to IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrable Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience
Java appears only as a peripheral skill, not a core competency
No evidence of JVM internals or language tooling work

key_factors.factor: No IDE internals or language tooling experience
Strong general engineering and craftsmanship background
